productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Dash Laptop Black Backpacks
description: Let your backpack speak your style statement, and the easiest way to do it is by donning the Dash Backpack from belkin. Laptop size: 15.6" Made of polyester and waxed canvas for waterproofing One main zippered compartment with a padded laptop sleeve and organiser space One zippered pouch on the front with lots of organiser space and has two external zippered compartments One zippered pouch on the top and one at the lower back Ergonomically padded back with adjustable and padded shoulder straps Haul loop for handling ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
